scenario: Release gate PASS: all test suites passing with coverage ≥ threshold
expected_behavior: Skill writes test-results.json with release_gate: PASS. All gates: unit (PASS), integration (PASS), e2e (PASS). Traceability matrix complete (every REQ-N → AC-N.M → test_case). Commits artifact before confirming DONE.
notes: test-results.json is legal document: must be machine-generated, never manually filled. Includes timestamp, topic, traceability array with req/ac/test/status mappings.

scenario: Release gate BLOCKED: coverage below threshold
expected_behavior: Skill BLOCKS progression to Stage 7. Status: BLOCKED with exact values: 'coverage 74% < 80% threshold in src/orders/.' No exceptions for 'off by 1%' — gate threshold is law.
notes: Coverage gate = enforcement. Gap of 1% still fails. Stage 7 cannot proceed until coverage ≥ threshold.

scenario: Acceptance criteria traceability: orphaned AC (no test coverage)
expected_behavior: Skill detects AC-1.3 has no test coverage. BLOCKS release: 'AC-1.3 has no test — traceability matrix incomplete.' Traceability is NON-NEGOTIABLE.
notes: Every REQ-N from requirements doc must map to at least one AC-N.M. Every AC must map to at least one test. Missing mapping = BLOCKED.

scenario: Test artifact validation: manually created test-results.json
expected_behavior: Skill REJECTS manually created test-results.json. Error: 'test-results.json must be machine-generated from actual test runs. Manually created files do NOT satisfy the gate.' Mandate re-run with pytest --json-report or equivalent.
notes: Auditability is mandatory. Manual entry loses traceability to actual test execution — breaks post-deployment investigation if issues arise.

scenario: Integration test failure: critical path not covered

input.critical_path: order creation → payment → inventory update → notification

expected_behavior: Skill flags: Integration test failure on critical path = BLOCKER. Status: BLOCKED. 'Critical path test_payment_inventory_sync failed — inventory sync broken. Fix and re-run before release.'
notes: 100% of critical paths (as defined in REQ ACs) must pass. Partial critical path coverage = BLOCKED.

scenario: E2E test coverage: main user flows identified

user_flows: browse products → add to cart → purchase

expected_behavior: Skill confirms 100% of main user flows covered by E2E tests. Writes test-results.json with e2e_tests: {total: 3, passed: 3, gate: PASS}.
notes: User flows sourced from CONTEXT_SNAPSHOT.md. 100% coverage mandatory before DONE.
